summary: Iteration 4 (Multi-store + suppliers + employee owner-code + forgot-pin OTP) FULLY VERIFIED — 15/15 new backend tests pass (test_daftari_v4.py), 25/25 v2+v3 regression tests still green, all 21 UI feature slices verified live on the Expo web preview (390x844).

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web deprecation warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Non-blocking; carry-over from iter_3.

action_items: Optional cleanup: legacy customer 'TEST_UI_CUST_EDITED' (max_debt=50, total 121.5) still lives on testuser's default store from iter_3 — not blocking, main agent can leave as-is.
Optional cleanup: iter_4 UI test created a store 'محل B' and 'TEST_UI_B' on testuser — main agent may delete via /stores UI or leave for regression.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py multi-store implementation is clean: ensure_default_store() is idempotent, resolve_store_id() enforces ownership (404 if mismatch), delete_store cascades customers+transactions in same store scope with count guard preventing last-store deletion.
list_customers defaults party_type to 'customer' when omitted (backward-compat) — matches spec. Supplier scoping is per-store, so supplier totals in /customers/summary are also store+party-scoped.

change_password endpoint enforces verification_code ONLY for role=='employee' — owners bypass this gate correctly. Codes are single-use (used_at set atomically after validation), and previously-unused codes for the same owner are invalidated when a new one is generated.

forgot-pin returns 200 for unknown users (no enumeration) AND ignores employees (they have no reset flow) — matches spec. reset_codes docs include username/phone/email so admin can identify who to relay to.
GET /api/admin/reset-codes filters expired codes in-python before returning — simple but correct; consider adding TTL index on reset_codes.expires_at in a future iteration.
Migration on startup backfills store_id + party_type on legacy customers/transactions — verified iter_3 leftover customer is now visible under 'المحل الرئيسي' with party_type='customer'.

Frontend: home.tsx conditionally renders open-verification-button / open-settings-button / open-staff-button by role — employee login correctly shows none of them (verified live). change-password screen surfaces change-pw-vc + change-pw-employee-hint only for employees.
Frontend: forgot-password 2-step flow correctly transitions after /auth/forgot-pin (always 200) and exposes the admin WhatsApp deep-link button — good UX for admin-relay OTP model.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of tested new-feature flows (store-switcher, picker modal, supplier tab + empty state + green FAB + total label, verification-code generate + share, stores add/edit/delete UI, employee home hides owner buttons, employee change-pw shows vc field + hint + Arabic error, forgot-pw 2-step + reset-error path)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests: fresh v4own_*/v4solo_*/v4fp_* owners, v4emp_* employees, TEST_ScopedA/TEST_StoreB/TEST_ScratchStore customers/stores (self-managed inside tests, mostly ephemeral). UI test created: employee 'uiemp_ea979' under testuser (pw emp1234 — password unchanged because verification code was NOT provided), store 'TEST_UI_B' + 'محل B' on testuser stores list.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iter_4 backend + frontend features are verified passing. Regression suites (run in this order): test_daftari_backend.py → test_daftari_v2.py → test_change_password.py → test_daftari_v4.py. Env: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL. Credentials unchanged (admin/admin1234, testuser/test1234). New testIDs verified live on the preview URL: store-switcher, store-picker-modal, store-item-*, store-picker-close, manage-stores-btn, tab-customer, tab-supplier, open-verification-button, vc-generate, vc-code, vc-share, stores-add-btn, store-add-name, store-add-confirm, store-edit-*, store-delete-* (visible), change-pw-vc, change-pw-employee-hint, forgot-username-input, forgot-request-code, forgot-whatsapp-button, reset-code-input, reset-new-pass, reset-confirm-pass, reset-submit, reset-error. Fresh helper employee 'uiemp_ea979/emp1234' exists under testuser if you need one. For forgot-pin OTP retrieval, use admin token → GET /api/admin/reset-codes (already covered by test_forgot_and_reset_owner).
rca_of_issue: No bugs found in iter_4 scope. All 21 features from the review request are working end-to-end.
